backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing order and delivery management with functions to place orders, schedule deliveries, fetch order history, get delivery schedules, update order status, and cancel orders using Map-based storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three features: debugging order history errors, debugging delivery schedule errors, and adding delivery date field to the delivery schedule display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing a dairy ordering app with warm color theme, Hindi support, product pages, order forms, payment QR integration, order history, and delivery schedule pages.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, defining a neutral grayscale palette for the application's design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Parwati Dairy App with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining routes for home, products, order form, contact, order history, and delivery schedule pages, all wrapped in a Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Responsive layout component with sticky header featuring Parwati Dairy logo, Hindi tagline, navigation menu (including Order History and Delivery Schedule), mobile menu toggle, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing authenticated or anonymous actor creation based on Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity authentication provider and hook managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with custom derivation origin support.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching order history by customer ID and delivery schedule by order ID, with error handling, retry logic, and proper null checking.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm dairy-themed color palette (creamy whites, oranges, earth tones) for both light and dark modes, plus custom font families including Hindi Devanagari support.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying Parwati Dairy's location (Hazaribagh, Jharkhand), phone numbers (8553965714, 6205017829), and business information with styled cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/DeliverySchedule.tsx: Displays upcoming delivery schedule by fetching and filtering pending orders for a customer, showing delivery dates, times, and order details with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero section featuring Parwati Dairy logo, navigation buttons for ordering Milk/Paneer/Ghee and contacting, plus a features section highlighting product benefits.
frontend/src/pages/OrderForm.tsx: Order form component with validation for customer details (name, phone, address) and product selection (Milk/Paneer/Ghee), submitting orders via WhatsApp and providing PhonePe payment QR code access.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Displays customer order history with status badges (placed/delivered/canceled), formatted dates, and icons, fetching data for customerId=1 with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products page component displaying three dairy products (Milk, Paneer, Ghee) with prices, descriptions, Hindi names, and 'Order Now' buttons that navigate to the order form with pre-selected product.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Utility function to format order data and open WhatsApp with pre-filled message to business number 918553965714 for order submission.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending colors (using OKLCH color space), fonts (Inter and Noto Sans Devanagari for Hindi), border radius, shadows, and animations for the dairy app UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (home, products, order form, WhatsApp integration, contact page), known issues (order history and delivery schedule errors), and architectural notes for the Parwati Dairy mobile ordering app.
